description: Small fragment with Arabic script in a chancery hand with wide spacing. Possibly a state document. A few words from the two fragmentary lines read - "bimā tashraḥ min ḥālihim", "Jamāl al-Dawla". ENA 3695.4, ENA 3695.5, and ENA 3695.8 all look very similar, might be from the same original document.
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
